libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use the shaded Parquet Jackson APIs, e.g. shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*. Do not add normal com.fasterxml.jackson dependencies. If tests exercise shaded Jackson internals such as ClassUtil.findEnumType on EnumSet or EnumMap, configure JVM test execution and native-image build/run arguments with --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED; otherwise those paths fail with InaccessibleObjectException on JDK 17+.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The current failure shown for JacksonAnnotationIntrospector.findEnumValue appears to be a version behavior/API expectation change in the shaded Jackson code, not missing deterministic setup.
Avoid tests that depend on unshaded Jackson packages; parquet-jackson relocates Jackson under shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.
Coverage involving internal shaded Jackson reflection may be JDK-sensitive unless the java.util module open is preserved.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson is a self-contained shaded Jackson artifact with no runtime Maven services, Docker service, or external dependency requirement, but meaningful tests that exercise Jackson enum-type introspection need java.util opened on modern JDKs.
